Canapés &Drinks Receptions

Beautiful, bite-sized and made to impress — canapés that set the tone for your occasion.

Request a Quote
About This Menu

Our canapés are crafted with the same care as a full meal — seasonal ingredients, considered combinations and beautiful presentation. Perfect for drinks receptions, weddings, corporate launches and special occasions.

Why Choose Us

What to Expect

◈

Generous Portions

Food designed to be shared and enjoyed together — nobody leaves hungry.

◇

Fresh Ingredients

Seasonal, high-quality produce sourced locally wherever possible.

◉

Flexible Menus

Every menu is tailored to your event, your guests and your vision.

The Menu

SampleCanapé Selection

Cold Canapés

Smoked salmon & cucumbercream cheese, dill
Mozzarella & sun-dried tomato skewerspesto drizzle
Pesto & tomato on seeded crackerfresh basil
Charcuterie & manchegoquince jelly
Brie & fig on walnut breadhoney

Warm Canapés

Mini filo pastry casesgoat's cheese & red onion
Chicken satay skewerspeanut sauce
Mushroom & truffle bruschettaparmesan
Beetroot & feta blinicrème fraîche

Sweet Bites

Chocolate trufflecocoa dusted
Lemon posset tartletsfresh raspberry
Mini browniessea salt

We recommend 6–8 canapés per person for a drinks reception, or 10–12 as a meal replacement. We're happy to advise on quantities.

Inclusive Catering

DietaryRequirements

Vegetarian Vegan Gluten Free Dairy Free Nut Free Halal

We are happy to cater for all dietary requirements. Just let us know when you get in touch and we'll make sure every guest is looked after.

Menus can be fully tailored — from individual dishes to entirely separate courses — so no one feels like an afterthought.

Planning aReception?

Tell us about your event and we will create a menu that works perfectly for you.
